description_long: This is a double bed with a simple, rectangular wooden frame featuring both a headboard and a footboard. The bed is positioned against two olive-green walls and sits on a gray floor, with a modern, conical pendant lamp hanging above the headboard. The mattress is topped with a pink comforter and two matching pillows, giving the bed a cozy and inviting appearance. The frame appears sturdy, constructed from dark wood, and the bedding is neatly arranged. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible storage or decorative elements. The setting suggests a contemporary bedroom environment, but the bed itself could be used in various urban contexts.
description: A double bed with a dark wooden frame, pink comforter, and pillows, set against olive-green walls with a hanging lamp above. The design is minimalistic and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard, pink bedding, and the pendant lamp centered above the bed.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the footboard, the full length of the bed, and the bedding arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view mostly obscured by the wall, with only the lamp and a small part of the bed frame visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the top of the lamp and the upper edge of the headboard and footboard behind the wall.
